title: Centrifuged Plaque Assay Sample Steps
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"9ugtg","text":"For Transcriptomics During One-Step Growth Curves for Cellulophaga Phages protocol.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[{"key":0,"offset":4,"length":78}],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{"0":{"type":"link","mutability":"MUTABLE","data":{"guid":"9F1E1C3F7DCF43E594A9D81AF27F1D7B","url":"https://www.protocols.io/view/Transcriptomics-During-One-Step-Growth-Curves-for-dem3c5"}}}}
steps: Pipet 10 µl from the flask into 990 µl of MSM in a 1.5 ml tube You are diluting your sample 100x: 10 -2 .
Very carefully remove the tube Do not disturb the pellet!
Do serial dilutions to make 10 -4 and 10 -5 dilutions
Plate 100 µl each from the 10 -4 and 10 -5 dilutions
